final:
module RefModule (
    input D,
    input CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    reg unused_master;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        unused_master <= D;  // Capture D on the rising edge of the clock
    end

    always @(negedge CLK) begin
        Q <= unused_master;  // Output the unused_master value on the falling edge of the clock
    end
endmodule
